definition.procedurexml:
<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="String" id="textmcr">textmcr</variable><variable type="Entity" id="entitymcr">entitymcr</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">chat_sent</field><next><block type="variables_set_entity"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:entitymcr</field><value name="VAL"><block type="custom_dependency_entity"><field name="NAME">entity</field></block></value><next><block type="variables_set_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:textmcr</field><value name="VAL"><block type="custom_dependency_string"><field name="NAME">text</field></block></value><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">// 使用局部变量 textmcr 和 entitymcr（名字你可以自定义）&#10;if (textmcr == null || !textmcr.startsWith("!docker")) return;&#10;&#10;// 获取玩家（Spigot 中实体通常是 Player）&#10;if (!(entitymcr instanceof org.bukkit.entity.Player)) return;&#10;org.bukkit.entity.Player player = (org.bukkit.entity.Player) entitymcr;&#10;&#10;// 权限检查（OP）&#10;if (!player.isOp()) {&#10;    player.sendMessage(org.bukkit.ChatColor.RED + "需要 OP 权限");&#10;    return;&#10;}&#10;&#10;String dockerArgs = textmcr.substring(7).trim();&#10;if (dockerArgs.isEmpty()) {&#10;    player.sendMessage(org.bukkit.ChatColor.YELLOW + "用法：!docker <docker命令>  例如 !docker ps");&#10;    return;&#10;}&#10;&#10;// 危险符号黑名单（通用）&#10;String[] dangerous = {"|", "&", ";", "&&", "||", "$", "`", "(", ")", "<", ">", "
", ""};&#10;for (String sym : dangerous) {&#10;    if (dockerArgs.contains(sym)) {&#10;        player.sendMessage(org.bukkit.ChatColor.RED + "不允许使用危险符号: " + sym);&#10;        return;&#10;    }&#10;}&#10;&#10;// 检测操作系统&#10;String os = System.getProperty("os.name").toLowerCase();&#10;boolean isWindows = os.contains("win");&#10;&#10;// 构建完整命令&#10;String fullCommand;&#10;if (isWindows) {&#10;    fullCommand = "cmd /c docker " + dockerArgs;&#10;} else {&#10;    String escaped = dockerArgs.replace("'", "'\''");&#10;    fullCommand = "bash -c 'docker " + escaped + "'";&#10;}&#10;&#10;try {&#10;    Process process = Runtime.getRuntime().exec(fullCommand);&#10;    java.io.BufferedReader stdInput = new java.io.BufferedReader(new java.io.InputStreamReader(process.getInputStream()));&#10;    java.io.BufferedReader stdError = new java.io.BufferedReader(new java.io.InputStreamReader(process.getErrorStream()));&#10;    StringBuilder output = new StringBuilder();&#10;    String line;&#10;    while ((line = stdInput.readLine()) != null) output.append(line).append("
");&#10;    while ((line = stdError.readLine()) != null) output.append(line).append("
");&#10;    process.waitFor();&#10;    String result = output.toString();&#10;    if (result.isEmpty()) {&#10;        player.sendMessage(org.bukkit.ChatColor.GRAY + "命令执行成功，无输出内容");&#10;    } else {&#10;        player.sendMessage(result);&#10;    }&#10;} catch (Exception e) {&#10;    player.sendMessage(org.bukkit.ChatColor.RED + "执行错误: " + e.getMessage());&#10;}</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
